hooks.command: fp=$(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); if [[ "$fp" == *.py ]]; then cd backend && uv run ruff check --fix "$fp" 2>&1 && uv run ruff format "$fp" 2>&1; fi

fp=$(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); if [[ "$fp" == *.ts || "$fp" == *.tsx ]]; then cd frontend && npx prettier --write "$fp" 2>&1 && npx eslint --fix "$fp" 2>&1; fi
cd backend && uv run ruff check . 2>&1 | head -50
